Today's Slot B (2026-05-21T10:30:03Z) explicitly recommended Slot A finish M14-M16 against the Unit 8 CED to reach 16/16. The 'do not add AP Bio until existing are audited' block is genuinely lifted (every prior module carries _review_A/B/C). produced_detail.title: Module 14: Ecosystems and Energy Flow
cb_topics: One-way energy flow vs matter cycling
round_1_fixes_applied: 12_pyramids: inverted aquatic biomass pyramid now explained via standing-crop-vs-turnover (rapid phytoplankton reproduction), not size alone (flagged by reviewers A and B)
07_energy_budget: producer-level energy explicitly labeled NPP (energy available to consumers) to remove GPP/NPP ambiguity (flagged by reviewer B)
ap_traps_inoculated: energy flows / matter cycles (energy is not recycled)
energy pyramid always upright but biomass/numbers can invert
nitrogen fixation specifically means N2 -> ammonia
decomposers act at every trophic level
produced_detail.audit_verdict: needs_review (driven solely by the by-design 'No MP4 found' major + an AP-naming note)

produced_detail.title: Module 15: Ecosystems — Advanced Applications
cb_topics: Climate change, ocean acidification, coral bleaching
round_1_fixes_applied: 08_biomagnification: magnification now attributed to TOXIN RETENTION (persistent/fat-soluble toxins not excreted, accumulating up the chain), NOT the 10% rule as cause; cleanly split from bioaccumulation (flagged by reviewers A and B — most important fix)
10_climate_acidification: coral bleaching now stated as primarily THERMAL (warming -> expel zooxanthellae); ocean acidification a SEPARATE CO2/calcification problem (flagged by A and C)
12_productivity_def: light/dark bottle now states the explicit equal-respiration assumption so GPP = NPP + respiration is derived, not asserted (flagged by A and B)
ap_traps_inoculated: phosphorus cycle has no atmospheric pool and is slow
eutrophication kills via oxygen depletion not direct algal toxicity
biomagnification (up the chain) vs bioaccumulation (within one organism)
light bottle = NPP, dark = respiration, GPP = NPP + respiration
ocean acidification (carbonic acid) distinct from warming
produced_detail.post_audit_fix: Audit flagged a 'No assignment/practice/portal next-action language' minor on 16_path. Edited narration (Drill->Practice; 'advanced problem set'->'advanced assignment') to satisfy the AGENT_RECIPE concrete-Learn-Portal-action rule. Narration-only, no slide rebuild. course_status_after_run: AP Biology 16/16 modules produced (M1-M16). Course complete. Every module carries the 3-reviewer cascade (M1-M9 post-hoc audited; M10-M16 full generator->cascade->writer pipeline).

verification.artifact_contract: ALL required files present in all three folders: _outline.json, _review_A/B/C.json (+ _review_A/B/C_v2.json for M14 & M15 which went to round 2), script.json, build_slides.py, learning_check.json, slides/*.png, intro_music.wav, outro_music.wav, contact-sheet.jpg
verification.banned_terms_check: clean — no Cognia, US-accredited, accredited, UCSB, NJIT, (SIT), or the simplified-Chinese accreditation phrase in any script.json or build_slides.py
verification.release_gate_note: All three score 79 with verdict needs_revision. CALIBRATION: this is the normal generation-stage state — identical to already-shipped siblings M10 (62), M11 (63), M12/M13 (79). The blocking 'major' is 'No MP4 found', which is INTENTIONAL at generation stage per AUTO_PIPELINE.md (the Mac launchd builds MP4s downstream, clearing the major). None are 'blocked'. The one genuinely actionable minor (M15 next-action language) was fixed.

throughput: 3 modules. M14 & M15 each through the full 2-round 3-reviewer cascade (12 review JSON files); M16 shipped on round 1 (pass/minor/pass). Total: 3 generators + 9 round-1 reviewers + 2 revisions + 6 round-2 reviewers + 3 writers + 1 narration-trim pass + 1 next-action fix. Peak parallel sub-agents: 6.
anomalies: audit_lessons.py intermittently reported the 'No MP4 found' major and sometimes an empty issues list across rapid back-to-back runs on the same lesson (likely a same-second output-file timestamp collision in teaching-videos/_audit/lesson-quality/). The release gate consistently reported needs_revision for all three (the by-design no-MP4 state), so this did not affect the conclusion. Future cleanup: have audit_lessons.py include a per-lesson suffix in its output filename to avoid collisions.

Two _audit locations still coexist: root /_audit/<course>/ (AP Biology run history, where this summary + plan live) and /teaching-videos/_audit/<course>/ (where the lesson-quality + release-gate tool outputs land). Carried forward from prior runs; a future cleanup could consolidate.
next_slot_recommendations: AP Biology is now 16/16 complete. The reference-doc-backed generation backlog is genuinely exhausted: AP Calc AB done, AP Biology done; AP CS A and AP Psychology have no references/<slug>-ced.md so Reviewer C cannot run.

To unblock further auto-runs a human must add a CED reference doc (e.g. references/ap-cs-a-ced.md, references/ap-psychology-ced.md) — that enables either retroactive cascades for those courses' existing script.json content or fresh module generation. Alternatively add references for a brand-new course with prisma defs but no teaching-videos (AP Statistics, Geometry, Chemistry, US History, etc.).

Until a new reference exists, future slots should default to audit/QA-only work (e.g., the AP-course-naming note that recurs on every AP module's audit, or consolidating the two _audit locations) rather than generating un-citation-checkable content.
